creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Interestingly enough, with my AMD-G-T40E I notice that my x86info output lists the CPU as "unknown" vs the original report which seems to successfully identify it. 

Also, with powerd enabled I seem to be getting some CPU frequency scaling working:

dev.cpu.0.freq: 125
dev.cpu.0.freq_levels: 1000/-1 875/-1 750/-1 625/-1 500/-1 375/-1 250/-1 125/-1

But mine couldn't read the P-states

Ours both have slightly different CPU Family/Model numbers...
